album_name: From Lost to Found: The Odyssey

tracks.title: 01: The House of Giants
tracks.lyrics:
[Intro: A heavy THUD of the Book hitting the table...]

(Kalobe): The lumber is heavy, the rafters are high...

tracks.title: 09: We Danced Through the Flames
tracks.lyrics:
(Daniel): I thought the fire would take me.
(Shae): I thought the dark would finally know my name...
tracks.resonance: The Signal of the Fox and Wolf.
